column1: SecurityAgenticControlFailure\t arXiv preprints on LLM jailbreak attacks (Benign-to-Toxic, Jailbreak Distillation, PBI-Attack, Latent Jailbreak)\tFigureJailbreakAttackTaxonomy\tWhen at least 3 distinct attack vectors are identified and documented\tall:jailbreak OR all:prompt* OR all:poisoning in cat:cs.CY\t4

PromptInjection\t arXiv preprints on universal prompt injection defenses (SecAlign, UniGuardian, StruQ)\tFigurePromptInjectionTaxonomy\tWhen at least 2 distinct defense mechanisms are validated and documented\tall:prompt AND injection in cat:cs.CL\t3

ModelPoisoning\t arXiv preprints on model poisoning and data poisoning defenses (Model-Targeted Poisoning Attacks, Autoregressive Perturbations, Policy Teaching, Influence Based Defense, Scaling Trends for Data Poisoning in LLMs)\tFigureModelPoisoningTaxonomy\tWhen at least 3 distinct poisoning techniques and defenses are documented\tall:model AND poisoning AND (attack OR defense) in (cat:cs.CR OR cat:cs.LG)\t5
